display.purpose: The available or over-budget figure on the home screen. Used exactly once per screen.

title.purpose: Income strip values, input fields, transaction sheet secondary amounts.

body.purpose: Row titles, merchant names, field labels.

label.purpose: Uppercase metadata: group names (TODAY), strip labels (INCOME, BUDGET), category counts.

shadows.name: tab-bar
shadows.purpose: Floating tab bar pill — separates chrome from scrollable content below. Dark mode: opacity 0.5.

shadows.name: dropdown-structured
shadows.purpose: Month picker dropdown — must read as higher than the scroll container beneath it.

motion.name: spring-standard
motion.purpose: Segmented control sliding indicator. Also used for drawer and collapsible group expansion.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Short state transitions (opacity, background color). Duration: 150–200ms.

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Floating capsule navigation with blur backdrop on iOS. Four icon-only tabs plus a mic/add button separated by a hairline divider.
components.css: .ds-tab-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); border: 1px solid rgba(14,14,16,0.10); border-radius: 100px; padding: 8px; gap: 4px; box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); width: fit-content; } .ds-tab-btn { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; border: none; background: transparent; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-tab-btn:hover { background: rgba(14,14,16,0.04); } .ds-tab-btn--mic { background: #D6E4D8; } .ds-tab-btn--mic:hover { background: #C8DDD2; } .ds-tab-divider { width: 1px; height: 24px; background: rgba(14,14,16,0.10); margin: 0 2px; }

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: Pill container with an animated sliding indicator. Used for period selection (Week / Month / Year).
components.css: .ds-segmented { position: relative; display: inline-flex; background: rgba(14,14,16,0.04); border-radius: 100px; padding: 3px; gap: 0; } .ds-seg-indicator { position: absolute; top: 3px; left: 3px; bottom: 3px; background: #0E0E10; border-radius: 100px; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), width 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); pointer-events: none; } .ds-seg-btn { position: relative; padding: 5px 11px; border: none; background: transparent; border-radius: 100px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(14,14,16,0.55); cursor: pointer; letter-spacing: 0.2px; transition: color 0.15s; z-index: 1; } .ds-seg-btn--active { font-weight: 700; color: #F7F8FA; }

components.name: Icon Circle — Needs
components.description: 36px category icon circle. Color encodes spending group. Always perfectly round.
components.css: .ds-icon-circle { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 18px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-icon-circle--needs { background: #5E82A8; } .ds-icon-circle--wants { background: #C19A4B; } .ds-icon-circle--savings { background: #6E9B82; }

components.name: Transaction Row
components.description: Standard row used in Activity and Upcoming sections. Icon circle + merchant name + category + amount.
components.html:
Blue Bottle CoffeeDining · 9:14 AM
$6.50
components.css: .ds-tx-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(14,14,16,0.08); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-icon-circle { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 18px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-icon-circle--wants { background: #C19A4B; } .ds-tx-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-tx-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.2px; color: #0E0E10; } .ds-tx-sub { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(14,14,16,0.55); } .ds-tx-amt { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.2px; color: rgba(14,14,16,0.55); }

components.name: Save Button
components.description: Full-width primary action. The only full-bleed button in the system. Near-ink background, page-wash text.
components.css: .ds-save-btn { background: #0E0E10; color: #F7F8FA; padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: 16px; border: none; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; width: 100%; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-save-btn:hover { opacity: 0.82; } .ds-save-btn:active { opacity: 0.7; }

components.name: Category Progress Bar
components.description: Two-level progress bar used in CategoryGroups. Group level: 10px height. Sub-category level: 5px. Fill color tracks spending group.
components.css: .ds-prog-group { width: 240px; } .ds-prog-track { height: 10px; border-radius: 5px; background: rgba(14,14,16,0.10); overflow: hidden; } .ds-prog-track--sub { height: 5px; border-radius: 3px; } .ds-prog-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; } .ds-prog-fill--needs { background: #5E82A8; } .ds-prog-fill--wants { background: #C19A4B; } .ds-prog-fill--savings { background: #6E9B82; } .ds-prog-fill--over { background: #D4522A; }

components.name: Accent Hero Zone
components.description: The budget hero card on HomeScreen. Full-width, accent-fill background, rounded bottom corners. Contains the display-size available/over-budget figure.
components.html:
May 2026 · 13 days left
AVAILABLE
$2,134.00
INCOME$5,200
BUDGET$3,900
AFTER BUDGET$1,300
components.css: .ds-hero-zone { background: #D6E4D8; border-radius: 0 0 28px 28px; padding: 16px 24px 28px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-hero-period { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #3F5A48; letter-spacing: -0.3px; margin-bottom: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-hero-remaining { color: rgba(14,14,16,0.32); } .ds-hero-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; color: #3F5A48; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-hero-amount { font-size: 42px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -1.2px; color: #0E0E10; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 22px; } .ds-hero-cents { font-size: 28px; } .ds-hero-strip { display: flex; align-items: center; border-top: 1px solid rgba(14,14,16,0.10); padding-top: 18px; } .ds-strip-item { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-strip-lbl { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px; color: rgba(14,14,16,0.55); } .ds-strip-val { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.3px; color: #0E0E10; } .ds-strip-val--accent { color: #7A9D85; } .ds-strip-div { width: 1px; height: 28px; background: rgba(14,14,16,0.10); }

narrative.overview:
A finance tool stripped to its essential transaction: you, your spending, and clear numbers. The interface makes no attempt to impress. Typography is the primary aesthetic vehicle; color enters only to encode state (over or under budget, category groups, or a chosen accent). The surface recedes so the data can speak.

The palette is built on near-ink neutrals with one runtime-switchable accent. The default accent is Still Verdigris — dusty, muted, slightly aged, like patinated copper. It appears in three tightly bounded roles and nowhere else. The 50/30/20 budget framework is given its own color vocabulary (slate for needs, amber for wants, moss for savings) that never overlaps with the accent system.

This system explicitly rejects gamification, dark mode as an aesthetic default, and every finance-domain reflex: no navy and gold, no gradient metrics, no glowing dashboards. If something shouts or celebrates, it is wrong.
keyCharacteristics: Single typeface (Inter) carrying all roles: 10px uppercase metadata through 42px budget display
Hairline borders define surfaces at rest; shadows appear only on chrome that physically layers above content
Six switchable accent keys (sage, butter, sky, rose, plum, ink) using fill, ink, and dot roles
50/30/20 groups encoded in a fixed three-color palette: slate (needs), amber (wants), moss (savings)
Dark mode shifts the canvas to deep navy (#0B1020), not pure black, preserving a tinted warmth

rules.name: The Verdigris Economy Rule
rules.body: The accent appears in three roles only: the hero budget zone background (verdigris-fill), interactive action labels and dots (verdigris-dot), and text on accent surfaces (verdigris-ink). It never appears as a row border, a chart color, or a decorative fill.

rules.name: The No-Chart-Accent Rule
rules.body: Charts, donut segments, and progress bars always use the group palette (slate, amber, moss) or category pastels. The accent color is forbidden in data visualization.

rules.name: The Silent Scale Rule
rules.body: Type size changes signal function. The 42px display belongs to one metric: the available or over-budget figure. The 18px headline belongs to section titles. Emphasis within a tier uses weight (500→700), not size.

rules.name: The Flat Content Rule
rules.body: Transaction rows, category group lists, budget progress bars, and any data surface are always flat at rest. No data surface ever casts a shadow. If a surface can be scrolled past, it cannot cast a shadow.

dos: Do use 1px hairline borders to define surfaces at rest.
Do apply the flat-first rule: data surfaces never cast shadows at rest.
donts: Don't add gamification: no badges, achievement notifications, points, streaks, or celebratory animations.
Don't add side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right over 1px) to rows, cards, or callouts.
Don't shadow data rows, category cards, or list items.
Don't build complex navigation hierarchies or hide features behind nested menus.
